message: Node started: Establish the physical model for the exciton system. Identify the relationship between the band gap (Eg), the observed 1s exciton peak energy (E_1s), and the exciton binding energy (E_b). Define the zero-point reference frame (e.g., the conduction band edge or the vacuum level) and establish a consistent sign convention for binding energies (e.g., whether the Rydberg energy is expressed as a positive magnitude or a negative energy value relative to the band edge). Determine the effective Rydberg constant (Ry*) based on the 1s state.
